item.title: CRANKBROTHERS Pedali Crankbrot Stamp 1 S Rosso
item.description: CRANKBROTHERS Pedali Crankbrot Stamp 1 S Rosso qui: ℹ️: Pedali flat CRANKBROTHERS STAMP 1 small, corpo in composito, perno in acciaio forgiato scm 435su cuscinetto, peso 329 g al paio; misura 111 x 114 mm, adatto per scarpe 43, 49; uso consigliato FREERIDE, ENDURO, TRAIL, DOWNHILL, ALL MOUNTAIN 🛒 Acquista qui!! Check the price of this item in other countries: 🇬🇧 United Kingdom | 🇺🇸 USA | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇪🇸 Spain | 🇫🇷 France | 🇮🇹 Italia | 🇦🇪 Arab Emirates | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇧🇪 Belgium | 🇳🇱 Neederlands | 🇵🇱 Poland | 🇸🇪 Sweden |
